content.text: 请根据截图分析页面内容和状态，选择操作路径：XML方式：用 get_screen_xml 获取节点，点击用坐标调 click，输入用 innerid 调 input_text；视觉方式：用 ai_click(text/icon) 点击，用 ai_set_text 输入，用 ai_seq_click 批量点击。不要根据截图自行估算坐标。

content.text:
The device is stuck on Always-On Display (keyguard active per XML) and not responding to any taps, swipes, or app launches. I cannot wake it without a power-button capability, which is not exposed by the MCP toolset.

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device remained in Always-On Display / keyguard state throughout the session — repeated taps, multi-direction swipes, press_home, press_back, and open_app(org.videolan.vlc) all failed to wake or unlock the screen; XML consistently showed com.android.systemui:id/keyguard_root_view with no PIN prompt, but no input gesture dismissed it.", "screenshot_paths": ["MCP get_screenshot output: AOD black screen showing only dim time '01:1...' — keyguard never dismissed, VLC never reached"], "failure_reason": "Could not wake the device from AOD/keyguard; available MCP tools (click, swipe, press_home, press_back, open_app) did not register on the locked screen and no power-button tool is available, so VLC could not be opened to create the playlist."}

result:
The device is stuck on Always-On Display (keyguard active per XML) and not responding to any taps, swipes, or app launches. I cannot wake it without a power-button capability, which is not exposed by the MCP toolset.

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device remained in Always-On Display / keyguard state throughout the session — repeated taps, multi-direction swipes, press_home, press_back, and open_app(org.videolan.vlc) all failed to wake or unlock the screen; XML consistently showed com.android.systemui:id/keyguard_root_view with no PIN prompt, but no input gesture dismissed it.", "screenshot_paths": ["MCP get_screenshot output: AOD black screen showing only dim time '01:1...' — keyguard never dismissed, VLC never reached"], "failure_reason": "Could not wake the device from AOD/keyguard; available MCP tools (click, swipe, press_home, press_back, open_app) did not register on the locked screen and no power-button tool is available, so VLC could not be opened to create the playlist."}
